x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist uses Server CI attributes to contextualize incident impact, suggest affected CIs, and generate remediation steps. Missing mandatory fields make AI impact analysis effectively blind.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_name: Mandatory Field Population by CI Class
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Run discovery enrichment rules or import sets to populate name, os_version, and ip_address on cmdb_ci_server records. Navigate to cmdb_ci_server_list.do?sysparm_query=install_status=1^nameISEMPTY^ORos_versionISEMPTY^ORip_addressISEMPTY to identify gaps. Target: 80%+ of server CIs with all mandatory fields populated.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.sys_name: Mandatory Field Population by CI Class

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_76f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c15
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Now Assist uses Server CI attributes to contextualize incident impact, suggest affected CIs, and generate remediation steps. Missing mandatory fields make AI impact analysis effectively blind.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Mandatory Field Population by CI Class</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaComplete = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci_server');
    gaComplete.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaComplete.addQuery('name', '!=', '');
    gaComplete.addQuery('os_version', '!=', '');
    gaComplete.addQuery('ip_address', '!=', '');
    gaComplete.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaComplete.query();
    var complete = gaComplete.next() ? parseInt(gaComplete.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_ci_server');
    gaTotal.addQuery('install_status', 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return { status: 'not_applicable', actualValue: 'No active server CIs found',
            finding: 'No active server CIs found. Mandatory field population cannot be assessed.' };
    }

    var pct = Math.round((complete / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of Server CIs have mandatory fields populated (' + complete + ' of ' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 80) {
        return { status: 'ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of server CIs have name, OS version, and IP address populated. Now Assist has strong CI attribute data for AI analysis.' };
    } else if (pct >= 50) {
        return { status: 'needs_attention', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of server CIs have mandatory fields populated (target: 80%+). Incomplete CI data reduces Now Assist AI accuracy for server-related analysis.' };
    } else {
        return { status: 'not_ready', actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of server CIs have mandatory fields. Critical data gap — Now Assist cannot accurately reason about server infrastructure without name, OS version, and IP address.' };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CMDB</module><number>CHK0000374</number><order>20</order><remediation_guidance>Run discovery enrichment rules or import sets to populate name, os_version, and ip_address on cmdb_ci_server records. Navigate to cmdb_ci_server_list.do?sysparm_query=install_status=1^nameISEMPTY^ORos_versionISEMPTY^ORip_addressISEMPTY to identify gaps. Target: 80%+ of server CIs with all mandatory fields populated.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>76f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c15</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Mandatory Field Population by CI Class</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_76f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c15</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
sys_update_version.record_name: Mandatory Field Population by CI Class

sys_audit_delete.display_value: Mandatory Field Population by CI Class

sys_metadata_delete.sys_name: Mandatory Field Population by CI Class
